# Bikuben Barnepark

Bikuben Barnepark is a neighborhood park at Høybråtenveien 69, 1086 Oslo, Norway.

The site represents FORENINGEN BIKUBEN BARNEPARK, organization number 934371275. The association works to make the park more available to people in the local area, in cooperation with Oslo kommune.

Key facts:
- Name: Bikuben Barnepark
- Official association name: FORENINGEN BIKUBEN BARNEPARK
- Organization number: 934371275
- Address: Høybråtenveien 69, 1086 Oslo
- Coordinates: 59.944292027157864, 10.924050830087147
- Area: Høybråten, bydel Stovner, Oslo
- Primary image: https://bikubenbarnepark.no/assets/bikuben-social-1200x630.jpg
- Markdown version: https://bikubenbarnepark.no/index.md

Sources used on the site:
- Oslo Byleksikon about the name Bikuben: https://oslobyleksikon.no/side/Bikuben
- KlimaOslo article mentioning Bikuben: https://www.klimaoslo.no/skli-inn-i-lekemodus/
- Oslo kommune page about Høybråten barnepark: https://www.oslo.kommune.no/kunngjoringer/bymiljoetaten-leter-etter-leietaker-til-bygningene-pa-hoybraten-barnepark/

Static-site scope:
- This site has no public API.
- This site has no OAuth/OIDC-protected API.
- This site has no MCP server.
- This site does not expose WebMCP browser tools.
- Markdown content is available at /index.md. The edge layer can serve it for requests to / with Accept: text/markdown.
